mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE menu_record ( menu_seq, menu_id, up_menu_id, menu_nm, menu_type_cd, menu_view_path, menu_uri, use_flag, sort_seq, level, menu_name_path, menu_id_path, sort_seq_path, path, cycle ) AS ( SELECT tm.menu_seq, tm.menu_id, tm.up_menu_id, tm.menu_nm, tm.menu_type_cd, tm.menu_view_path, tm.menu_uri, tm.use_flag, tm.sort_seq, 0, tm.menu_nm || '' AS menu_name_path, tm.menu_id || '' AS menu_id_path, tm.menu_id || '' AS sort_seq_path, ARRAY[tm.menu_id], FALSE FROM tb_menu tm WHERE tm.up_menu_id IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT tm.menu_seq, tm.menu_id, tm.up_menu_id, tm.menu_nm, tm.menu_type_cd, tm.menu_view_path, tm.menu_uri, tm.use_flag, tm.sort_seq, level + 1, mr.menu_name_path || ' > ' || tm.menu_nm, mr.menu_id_path || ' > ' || tm.menu_id, mr.sort_seq_path || '-' || tm.sort_seq || '-' || tm.menu_id, mr.path || tm.menu_id, tm.menu_id = ANY(path) FROM tb_menu tm INNER JOIN menu_record mr ON tm.up_menu_id = mr.menu_id WHERE 1=1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT DISTINCT tagm.menu_seq FROM tb_user tu INNER JOIN tb_role_user tru ON tu.user_seq = tru.user_seq INNER JOIN tb_auth_grp_role tagr ON tru.role_seq = tagr.role_seq INNER JOIN tb_auth_grp_menu tagm ON tagr.auth_grp_seq = tagm.auth_grp_seq WHERE tu.user_id = #{userId} AND tagm.use_flag = TRUE AND tagr.use_flag = TRUE AND tagm.menu_seq = tm.menu_seq ) AND NOT CYCLE ) SELECT mr.menu_seq, mr.menu_id, mr.up_menu_id, mr.menu_nm, mr.menu_type_cd, mr.menu_view_path, mr.menu_uri, mr.use_flag, mr.sort_seq, mr.menu_name_path, mr.menu_id_path, mr.sort_seq_path, mr.path, mr.level, tu.user_name AS rgst_user_name, tm.rgst_date_time, tu2.user_name AS upt_user_name, tm.upt_date_time FROM menu_record mr LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_menu tm ON mr.menu_id = tm.menu_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_user tu ON tm.rgst_user_id = tu.user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_user tu2 ON tm.upt_user_id = tu2.user_id ORDER BY mr.sort_seq_path
